calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2007 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-27-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On May-01-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause was scheduled for Court Trial Hearing on this day.
This cause was re-assigned by the PJ. for settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Janet Pond.
Paul Yee, Esq. for Plaintiff: David Washburn, present.
Defendant: Robert Marshall, present.
Parties reached a settlement by Stipulation.
Plaintiff submitted Declarations of Timothy Dillon and Abraham Pearson in open court.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Defendant agreed to pay Plaintiff a total of $1,000.00. Initial payment of $500.00 due on or before May 1, 2006. Subsequential $50.00 payments will be due at the end of each month until fully paid.
Plaintiff shall dismiss the action upon receipt of full payment.
Parties agreed to terms in open court. Matter was deemed settled and trial was vacated. Matter was placed on CRC 225 calendar for dismissal on 5/1/07 at 10:00 am in Dept. 212.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
